suppressedMessages.message: Always prefer const x: T = { ... }.

fix.text:
{
                    top: 0,
                    left: 0,
                    borderTop: `1.5px solid ${cornerStatic}`,
                    borderLeft: `1.5px solid ${cornerStatic}`,
                    width: '42px',
                    height: '42px',
                  } satisfies CSSProperties

suggestions.desc: Use const x = { ... } satisfies CSSProperties instead.

suppressedMessages.message: Always prefer const x: T = { ... }.

fix.text:
{
                    background: cornerTrace,
                    boxShadow: `0 0 10px ${cornerTrace}`,
                    position: 'absolute',
                    top: 0,
                    left: 0,
                    height: '1.5px',
                    width: '42px',
                    transformOrigin: 'left center',
                    animation: 'corner-tl-trace-top 8s ease-in-out infinite',
                    display: 'block',
                  } satisfies CSSProperties

suggestions.desc: Use const x = { ... } satisfies CSSProperties instead.
